name: THE IMPECCABLES
description:
Our Club is a combination of vast varieties of domain. Individuals get exposure of various other domains which help them in refining and building new skills. Helps one to interact and build their personality as an individual. We create a stressfree environment and a family with whom we celebrate and enjoy each and every moment of our college life. Our domains include:

Creative Arts
Personality development
  Photography
Content writing
Open Mic
Video Editing
  Stand - up Comedy
